itemReviewed.name: Touch Sky The International PreSchool Kolature - Jayanthi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Touchsky preschool is a well-known playschool with three branches in Kolathur area. The Poombuhar Nagar and Senthil Nagar branches have a relatively big campus when compared to other playschools in the area, and this playschool boasts a huge play area for kids to enjoy.

One of the standout features of Touchsky preschool is the individual care provided to each child by the teachers and the founder Rashmika. They make every effort to involve children in each activity and encourage parents to support their child to perform better. This personalized attention ensures that children feel secure and loved while learning new things.

Touchsky preschool offers a range of activities to engage children and promote their social skills. Children have the opportunity to interact with others, develop confidence and communication skills, and participate in events and activities that help them overcome stage fear.

However, there are a few low-lights that parents should be aware of when considering Touchsky preschool. Firstly, the school's promotional activities could be improved. Secondly, parents only have the opportunity to attend two meetings per academic year, which might not be enough for some parents. Additionally, parents are not aware of what their children are being taught in the classroom, which could be improved.

Furthermore, some of the events and annual day celebrations are conducted in North Indian style, which may not be suitable for all parents and children. This could be changed to cater to the local culture and preferences.

Lastly, while Touchsky preschool teaches children many things, there are a few basic habits such as how to use the restroom or how to eat that could be emphasized more. Touchsky preschool should consider teaching these basics to children to instill good habits from a young age.

Overall, Touchsky preschool is a good option for parents looking for a playschool in Kolathur area. However, the management team should consider the low-light aspects mentioned above and make changes accordingly.

itemReviewed.name: Touch Sky The International PreSchool Kolature - Jayanthi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Best Pre School for children.. Proud to be a Touch Sky parent.. We keep admiring our child's development not only in curriculum but also in all the aspects.. The confident he has gained to speak, express and explore is biggest achievement.. Thank You Touch Sky

I truly appreciated and so happy to be part of touch sky family.
